name: Hartsfield Jackson Atlanta International Airport (ATL)
content: The Atlanta airport is ok. What is not ok is the fact that, at the time of my visit in Spring 2022, all three restaurants in the international terminal were being run by the same person. Simultaneously. This guy was doing his best and kinda vibing his way through it, so I do not blame him, but it was incredibly funny to watch one guy take a couple of orders at the cash register, walk into the kitchen of an entirely unrelated restaurant, prepare a couple of meals, then walk into a third restaurant to deliver some orders while the food was still cooking in the second restaurant, and so on, all while three horrendously long lines of customers and three crowds of hungry patrons watched in muted agony.
